hero.h1line1: A guide made by a traveler

trust.source: Based on official Kagoshima City GTFS open data

stopDetail.googleMapsWrong: Google Maps location is wrong — this app is accurate

partnership.body: This service is based on official Kagoshima City GTFS open data. Free, no ads. So more travelers can enjoy Kagoshima without confusion.

footer.source: Data: 鹿児島市 (processed from original)
footer.disclaimer: GPS location only. Always verify schedules via official app.

problem.title:
Google Maps is wrong,
and there are no signs
problem.item1: Google Maps points to the wrong location. One traveler waited 10 minutes and missed the bus.
problem.item2: There are no English or Korean signs at stops. Some foreign travelers didn't know to board when the bus arrived.
problem.item3: Accurate multilingual info in one place is hard to find. This app fills that gap.

offline.message: You're offline. Stop information is still available.
offline.installHint: Add to home screen for offline access.
